themes.exampleQuote: I like all of their flavors, but I always make sure to try their new flavors - because it always surprises me!
All the flavors tasted fresh and have robust flavors.
Never received a portion so small for $7 — these portions definitely need to be reevaluated!
I loved the waffle cones which they make fresh throughout the day.
It was stretched out further than a Utah wild wild west, but we stuck it out.

sentiment_summary: Reviewers rave about Jeni's creative, fresh-tasting flavors and fresh-made waffle cones, but frequently nitpick the high prices and inconsistently small portion sizes.
notable_quote: I've been to several locations in DC, MD & VA and never received a portion so small for $7 — these portions definitely need to be reevaluated!
